title: pilea usambarensis var. engleri
intro: Pilea usambarensis var. engleri, also known as African Frog Pod, is a plant species native to Africa. It is a medicinal plant used to treat various health conditions, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pilea usambarensis var. engleri include relieving fever, reducing inflammation, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas and infusions that can be used to treat various health conditions.
